steps.title: Identify the two-part claim
steps.content: The claim requires both elements: mistreatment of vulnerable people AND divine judgment as the consequence.

steps.title: Match the quotation to the claim
steps.content:
A directly states both elements: men “tread down the poor and lowly” and “crush them in anger and hate,” but “the mills of God's justice / Will grind out the grist of their fate”—divine judgment as consequence.

The other three choices omit the punishment element or don't address the mistreatment-judgment relationship.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
